texto: They don't think up questions like that on the basis of what might be true
autor: they concoct the questions on the basis of what might be sensational if it just happened to be true.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a they concoct the questions on the basis of what might be sensational if it just happened to be true.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “They don't think up questions like that on the basis of what might be true” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, walter-m-miller-jr, a-canticle-for-leibowitz pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de a-canticle-for-leibowitz.
